news.headline: COLOMBIAN FOREIGN MINISTER SARABIA RESIGNS - POST ON X

news.summary: In Dover, Del., the company Precisio recently administered the first-ever dose of its staph lysin, ClyO (LYSG101), to a patient suffering from a prosthetic joint infection that had shown resistance to existing treatments. The FDA greenlit this intervention through a compassionate care IND application submitted by the Mayo Clinic. The patient demonstrated good tolerability to the treatment with no reported adverse effects. While it is premature to determine complete efficacy, this development marks a remarkable advancement in expanding treatment choices for patients in similar situations.
news.headline: Precisio dosed first patient with ClyO (Staph Lysin) for drug-resistant prosthetic joint infection, no adverse events noted.FDA-approved.

news.summary: HKW, a middle market private equity firm, has recently completed the acquisition of Electric Equipment & Engineering Co. (EEE). EEE is renowned for manufacturing top-tier electrical power products catering to the power, telecommunications, and broadband sectors. James Raymond, the CEO of EEE, noted that HKW's alignment with their commitment to delivering premium power solutions to clients makes them an ideal partner. The acquisition signifies a strategic move by HKW, known for their focus on growth companies, leveraging their expertise to support EEE's operations.
news.headline: Private equity firm HKW acquires Electric Equipment & Engineering Co., manufacturer of electrical power products, aiming for quality service, per CEO James Raymond.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on July 3, 2025, a leading car accessory company named Pigenius emphasized the importance of using high-quality sunshades to shield car owners and vehicles from the intense sun. With a dedicated focus on car sunshades for the past three decades, Pigenius has prioritized safeguarding vehicle interiors and improving the driving experience.
news.headline: Pigenius launches new sunshade guide to help drivers beat the summer heat, focusing on car protection for 30 years.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025 in Houston, a notable recruitment firm is gaining significant attention for its exceptional performance. The CEO of the firm attributes the success to a distinct factor. With the recruitment industry confronting challenges due to advancements in AI and changing workforce preferences, organizations are finding themselves torn between prioritizing efficiency and quality. The firm's accomplishments showcase the significance of striking a balance in this evolving landscape.
news.headline: Houston recruiting firm CEO emphasizes growth amid industry challenges, breaking records. AI and evolving workforce expectations complicate decisions.

news.summary: A contentious proposal by United Parcel Service (UPS) is set to be revealed this month, ignoring its responsibility to generate employment opportunities. The plan involves the buyout of full-time workers represented by the Teamsters union. This move has sparked concerns as it could potentially leave these employees without jobs and responsible for their own healthcare coverage. The details of this controversial plan will be disclosed later in July.
news.headline: UPS plans to violate Teamsters contract with buyouts, jeopardizing jobs and health care for workers.

news.summary: The Hyundai IONIQ 5 XRT is now being produced at the Hyundai Motor Group Manufacturing America (HMGMA) facility in Georgia. This new model, known for its aggressive design, adds rugged capabilities to the lineup of America's Most Awarded EVs. The announcement was made in Fountain Valley, California on July 3, 2025. The IONIQ 5 XRT has been recognized as the Best U.S.-...
news.headline: Hyundai IONIQ 5 XRT awarded Best U.S.-Built Sports Vehicle. Assembled at HMGMA in Georgia.
TRUMP VOWS TO ENFORCE SOLAR, WIND TAX CREDIT PHASEOUTS: NORMAN

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have incurred losses in Vestis between May 2, 2024, and May 6, 2025. If you bought or obtained securities during this period and are seeking to explore potential avenues, Wilson encourages direct communication to discuss available options. Investors are urged to contact him directly for further guidance and potential assistance with their cases.
news.headline: Investors of Vestis between May 2, 2024 and May 6, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.

news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that approximately 300,000 people in the region were affected by the severe weather conditions, leading to 50 reported casualties and over 100 injuries. The devastating floods have damaged over 1,000 homes and displaced more than 10,000 residents. Relief efforts are currently underway, with emergency services working tirelessly to provide aid to those impacted. The local government has allocated 1 million dollars towards recovery efforts and has urged residents to prioritize their safety during this challenging time.
news.headline: Quadient wins award for excellent financial communication at 2025 Transparency Awards. #Recognition #Excellence

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Tyre Industry in South Africa 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the South African tyre industry, a notable component of the automotive sector. It covers various aspects such as the production of new and retreaded tyres, imports, distribution, domestic sales to original equipment manufacturers, replacement tyres through retail outlets and fitment centers, export sales, and waste tyre management. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable insights into an industry that plays a crucial role in the country's economy.
news.headline: South Africa Tyre Industry Report 2025 features 17 notable players; focus on manufacture, new & retreaded tyres, and waste management - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Krispy Kreme, Inc. (NASDAQ: DNUT) revealed that Raphael Duvivier, currently serving as the President, International of Krispy Kreme, will take over as the Chief Financial Officer starting from July 11, 2025. This move follows the departure of Jeremiah Ashukian, the previous CFO, who opted to leave the company for a new role in a private firm. Mr. Duvivier, who has been with Krispy Kreme since 2019, has undertaken various leadership positions within the organization, including serving as a segment Chief Fina.
news.headline: Krispy Kreme appoints Raphael Duvivier as CFO, effective July 11, 2025, replacing Jeremiah Ashukian. Duvivier served as President, International.

news.summary: The White House has been promoting the strong monthly job numbers as evidence of the "Trump effect." However, it is anticipated that these figures will decline due to President Trump's tough immigration stance, which is reducing the number of foreign-born workers available in the country.
news.headline: Solid job growth tied to Trump effect could dwindle due to immigration policies reducing foreign-born workers.

news.summary: In a press release dated July 3, 2025, BOXX Insurance Inc. disclosed that it will be acquired by Zurich Insurance Group, a prominent global multi-line insurer. BOXX, a renowned global cyber Insurtech, will be acquired as part of this agreement. BOXX is recognized for being the pioneer in all-in-one cyber insurance solutions.
news.headline: Global cyber Insurtech BOXX Insurance being acquired by Zurich, a leading multi-line insurer. announced on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: Amazon customers now have access to the newest version of ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer for QuickBooks, providing complete peace of mind. Users can print checks efficiently without any hidden expenses or ongoing charges. The software can be downloaded for a test run from Halfpricesoft.com. The update was announced in REDMOND, Wash. on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: New QuickBooks solution ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer available on Amazon, no hidden costs, no fees. Download at Halfpricesoft.com.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, BCE Inc. (TSX: BCE) (NYSE: BCE) announced that they are scheduled to have their second-quarter 2025 results conference call on August 7, 2025, at 8:00 am Eastern Time. The call will involve key figures such as Mirko Bibic, the President and Chief Executive Officer.
news.headline: BCE to announce Q2 2025 results on Aug 7 at 8:00 am eastern. Participants to include CEO Mirko Bibic.

news.summary: Maple Leaf Foods Inc., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol MFI, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of the year on August 7, 2025, at 6:00 am Eastern Time. Following the release, the company will conduct a conference call to discuss the results. For more information, visit their website at www.mapleleaffoods.com.
news.headline: Maple Leaf Foods (TSX: MFI) to announce Q2 financial results on August 7th, 2025 at 6:00 am ET.

news.summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) based in New York, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, on July 31, 2025, prior to market opening. Individuals are encouraged to attend the webcast...
news.headline: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) to release Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025. Webcast open to public.

news.summary: YZi Labs has recently participated in Digital Asset's Series E funding round, which raised $135 million. This makes YZi Labs one of the many prominent financial institutions backing Digital Asset, alongside companies like DRW, Tradeweb, Goldman Sachs, Citadel Securities, and DTCC. The investment from YZi Labs demonstrates a strong endorsement of compliant blockchain infrastructure and signifies a push towards institutional adoption. The funding is expected to drive the growth of Digital Asset's platform.
news.headline: YZi Labs joins financial giants in investing $135M in Digital Asset's Series E round, supporting institutional adoption of compliant blockchain infrastructure.
American Rebel Light Beer celebrates John Hall's NHRA win in Ohio. Cheers to his victory! 🏁🍻 #NHRA #Ohio #JohnHall

news.summary: Dublin, 3rd July 2025 - AerCap Holdings N.V. ("AerCap" or "the Company"), with stock listed on NYSE as AER, revealed plans to conduct a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts on 30th July 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET. The purpose is to examine its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. This announcement signifies the Company's ongoing commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.
news.headline: AerCap Holdings N.V. will release Q2 2025 financial results on July 30, 2025, with a conference call at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, High-Volume Hemodiafiltration has been introduced for the first time in seven out of 10 CCINSHAE centers in Mexico. This cutting-edge treatment is now being used to treat 240 CCINSHAE patients, in addition to over 410 regular patients. Fresenius Medical Care has expressed a strong dedication to making High-VolumeHDF therapy available in all markets, underlining the company's commitment to improving patient care worldwide.
news.headline: Collaboration brings High-Volume Hemodiafiltration to 7/10 centers in Mexico, treating 240 CCINSHAE patients and 410 regular patients. Fresenius aims to expand this therapy globally.

news.summary: In Chengdu, China, on July 3, 2025, Maase Inc. (NASDAQ: MAAS) revealed a definitive share purchase agreement with investors. The agreement entails the issuance of 10,000,000 Class A ordinary shares at a price of $2.08 per share, raising an estimated $21 million in gross proceeds. Additionally, investors will receive warrants to buy up to 20,000,000 more shares.
news.headline: MAAS to raise $21M through the private placement of 10M Class A shares at $2.08 per share, with warrants for 20M shares.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on July 3, 2025, Parex Resources Inc. (TSX: PXT) shared an update on their production status. The company, also known as Parex, disclosed their intention to unveil the financial and operational outcomes for Q2 of 2025 on July 30, 2025.
news.headline: Parex Resources (TSX: PXT) to release Q2 2025 results on July 30, 2025, after announcing production update.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Dallas, Argent Trust Company announced a cash distribution for unit holders of the Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR). The distribution amounts to $0.345930 per unit and will be paid on July 29, 2025, to unit holders recorded on July 15, 2025.
news.headline: Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR) declares $0.345930 per unit cash distribution for July 2025, payable on July 29.

news.summary: In Celebration, FL, on July 03, 2025, La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC), a real estate and PropTech company, revealed a significant achievement in its expansion by exceeding 3,000 real estate agents within its network. The Company disclosed preliminary unaudited revenue figures, noting a notable increase to approximately $38.4 million for the initial half of 2025. This marks a substantial surge of about 19.4% in year-over-year growth in comparison to the corresponding period in 2024.
news.headline: La Rosa Holdings Corp. hits 3,000 agents, records $38.4M revenue in H1 of 2025, with 19.4% YoY growth.

news.summary: Finnair has launched new subscription options for Avios Plusgrade's loyalty program, with monthly and annual plans now available. Points, the unit powering the service, has implemented unique features to enhance member engagement. This initiative aims to boost Finnair's loyalty growth, offering a more convenient way for customers to collect Avios.
news.headline: Finnair launches Avios Subscription Service with monthly & yearly options for members, powered by Plusgrade's Points unit.

news.summary: An initial payment of $5 million has been made, with the potential for an additional $4.9 million in total proceeds from short-term warrants if exercised in full.
news.headline: Netcapital announces $9.9M registered direct offering, $5M upfront with potential for additional $4.9M from warrants.

news.summary: In Fremont, California, on July 3, 2025, Weee! revealed the appointment of Devang Shah as General Counsel and Dan Li in a press release. Weee! is a prominent online grocery platform known for delivering authentic ethnic groceries to underserved communities throughout the United States. The platform, available at www.sayweee.com, has been recognized for its specialization in catering to the needs of diverse populations. The appointment of Shah and Li signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its leadership team as it continues to serve a growing customer base. This move aligns with Weee!'s mission to provide essential grocery delivery services to communities that have historically been overlooked.
news.headline: Weee! appoints Devang Shah as General Counsel & Dan Li as Senior VP of Finance to strengthen executive team.

news.summary: Clark Atlanta University has partnered with IBM SkillsBuild to provide students with the opportunity to utilize WatsonX for developing innovative solutions to practical issues. This collaboration was revealed on July 3, 2025, in Atlanta. The cooperation aims to enhance skills and talent among students by leveraging the resources offered by IBM SkillsBuild. The initiative will allow students at Clark Atlanta University to access WatsonX, enabling them to work on real-world problems and develop cutting-edge solutions.
news.headline: Clark Atlanta University partners with IBM for AI skills training program using watsonx to solve real-world problems.

news.summary: Perth, Australia - Locafy Limited, a prominent player in location-based digital marketing listed on the NASDAQ as LCFY, recently disclosed receiving a notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on July 1, 2025. The notice mentioned that the Company is currently not meeting Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(2) as it has not submitted a Form 6-K with an interim balance sheet and income statement for the second quarter ending on December 31, 2024. This development underscores the Company's non-compliance with the Rule.
news.headline: Locafy (LCFY) faces Nasdaq notice for late filing of Q2 financials by Dec 31, 2024, violating Rule 5250(c)(2).

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on July 03, 2025, Skyharbour Resources Ltd. has shared that partner company Mustang Energy Corp. has been granted exploration permits by the Saskatchewan Government for conducting ground-based activities at the 914W Uranium Project located south of the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan. Mustang Energy has the opportunity to obtain a 75% stake in the Project by issuing common shares worth CAD $480,000, making cash payments totaling $275,000 to Skyharbour, and investing $800,000 in exploration costs on the property across three years. Skyharbour Resources Ltd. trades on the TSX-V under symbol SYH, on the OTCQX as SYHBF, and on the Frankfurt stock exchange as SC1P.
news.headline: Skyharbour's partner Mustang Energy gets permit for 914W Uranium Project in Saskatchewan. Mustang to invest $1.555M for 75% interest.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, a solar PV product provider known as Skycorp Solar Group Limited (NASDAQ: PN) based in Ningbo, China, revealed its plan to venture into solar photovoltaic ("PV") power plant acquisitions and development projects. The company's Board of Directors unanimously approved a resolution allowing them to pursue these projects under a $150 million investment framework. This move signifies a significant progression in the company's strategic growth into renewable energy infrastructure, demonstrating their dedication to propelling the global shift towards clean energy solutions.
news.headline: Skycorp Solar Group receives board authorization for solar power plant projects with $150 million investment. Transition to clean energy emphasized.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, AYR Wellness Inc. revealed they received a Notification of Disposition of Collateral from Anthony J. DePaul, as Agent and Secured Party under the Pledge Agreement dated October 1, 2021, between CSAC Acquisition PA II Corp., a Company subsidiary, and the Agent. Additionally, they disclosed entering a Second Amendment to the Limited Waiver Agreement dated June 6, 2025, following a First Amendment on June 19, 2025. AYR, a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, is listed as (CSE: AYR.A, OTCQX: AYRWF).
news.headline: AYR Wellness receives notice of disposition of collateral; extends waiver agreement with noteholders.

news.summary: Following the release of Q2 delivery data, Tesla stock saw a slight increase in the stock market. Investors were concerned about the performance but the stock rallied nonetheless. The specific numbers were not disclosed.
news.headline: Tesla stock rises after strong Q2 deliveries, allaying investor fears. Post from Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Sarepta to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Sarepta within the period of June 22, 2023, to June 24, 2025, and wish to explore your options, please contact him directly.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Sarepta Therapeutics investors, urging those who suffered losses to contact them.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in DoubleVerify to reach out to him. If you bought or obtained securities in DoubleVerify from November 10, 2023, to February 27, 2025, Wilson invites you to discuss your options.
news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates DoubleVerify, urges investors who suffered losses between Nov.10, 2023-Feb.27, 2025 to contact.

news.summary: The addition of the new B200 and B300 fleet has increased the total number of GPUs to 4,300, enabling next-generation training and inference capabilities at a larger scale.
news.headline: IREN boosts AI Cloud with 2.4k NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, total now at 4.3k GPUs for enhanced training and inference.

news.summary: If you acquired Rocket Pharmaceuticals securities between February 27, 2025, and May [specific date], Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP urges investors facing losses to reach out to him directly. Discuss your options with him if you suffered financial setbacks during this period.
